mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(title, content, view_count,created_at) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, created_at AS createdAt where deleted_at is NULL FROM board
SELECT id, title, content, writer, view_count as viewCount, created_at AS createdAt FROM board WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, title FROM board where deleted_at is NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

select id, title, view_count as viewCount, created_at as createdAt FROM board
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortOrder} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: update board set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, created_at = NOW() where id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
update board set deleted_at = NOW() where id = #{id} and deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, parent_id, content, writer, created_at FROM comment WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
